title: the real impact of claw was normalizing the ability to chat with your ai from any channel

content.summary: the real impact of claw was normalizing the ability to chat with your ai from any channel Thariq (@trq212) We just released Claude Code channels, which allows you to control your Claude Code session through select MCPs, starting with Telegram and Discord. Use this to message Claude Code directly from your phone. Video — https://nitter.net/trq212/status/2034761016320696565#m
